title: pityrogramma tartarea
intro: Pityrogramma tartarea, also known as the Golden Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Pityrogramma tartarea is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
